user.title: SmartIR — Choose Platform
user.description: Select the type of device you want to control via IR.

controller_filter.title: SmartIR — Filter by Controller
controller_filter.description: Narrow the device list to a specific controller type, or show all.

manufacturer.title: SmartIR — Select Manufacturer
manufacturer.description: Choose your device manufacturer. Select **'Enter code manually'** if your device is not listed.

device_select.title: SmartIR — Select Device
device_select.description: Choose the device model for **{manufacturer}**. Each entry shows the numeric code and supported model names.

device_manual.title: SmartIR — Enter Device Code
device_manual.description: Enter the numeric device code. The file will be loaded from local storage or downloaded from GitHub.

device_name.title: SmartIR — Confirm Device Name

options_platform.title: SmartIR — Optional Settings

data.power_sensor_restore_state: Restore state from power sensor on startup

error.invalid_device_code: Device code not found locally and could not be downloaded from GitHub. Check the code number and your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: A SmartIR device with this code and controller is already configured.

data.power_sensor_restore_state: Restore state from power sensor on startup
